Step 1: Download Template

Download the Excel template, fill in your products, then upload it below.

Download Template Export Current Products

Step 2: Upload Excel File

Excel Format Instructions

Required columns:

  • name - Product name (must be unique)
  • category - Category name (must exist in system)
  • cost_price - Cost per unit
  • selling_price - Selling price per unit

Optional columns:

  • store_quantity - Warehouse stock (default: 0)
  • shop_quantity - Shop stock (default: 0)
  • reorder_level - Low stock alert level (default: 10)
  • unit - piece, bottle, pack, kg, carton, box (default: piece)
  • pack_size - Units per pack for bulk sales (default: 1)
  • pack_price - Discounted pack price (optional)

Available Categories:

{% for cat in categories %} {{ cat.name }} {% endfor %}

Manage categories to add more.

{% endblock %}
